svg.title: Rear Wall Plate — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Flat Plate with JG Fitting Bores, Guide Pin Bosses, Pogo Pads — Third-Angle Projection
Material: PETG (matte black) | All dimensions in mm | 147.8 x 14.8 x 69.8 mm envelope
DOCK FACE VIEW (looking along +Y, at Y=0)
INTERIOR FACE VIEW (looking along -Y, at Y=14.8)
DETAIL D: GUIDE PIN BOSS (side section)
1. Print orientation: dock face (Y=0) down on build plate. JG bores vertical.
2. JG fitting: PP0408W press-fit into 9.5mm bore (0.19mm interference). Shoulder zones 15.5mm clear body-ends.
3. Guide pins: 3mm x 40mm steel dowels press-fit into 3.1mm blind bores, 10mm deep from interior face.
4. Boss faces serve as compression spring seats (3mm ID spring, 8mm free length).
5. Pogo pads: 4mm copper inserts in 4.5mm x 0.5mm recesses, 5.08mm pitch. Flush with dock face.
6. U-notches: open at bottom edge, 3.4mm wide, for 3mm link rod pass-through (no guiding function).
7. 8x snap tab chamfers: 45 deg x 1mm, 6mm long, on left/right edges at tab engagement positions.
8. Elephant foot chamfer: 0.3mm x 45 deg on all dock-face edges (print bed surface).
9. General exterior chamfer: 1mm on all non-bottom exterior edges.
